SIGNED this 23rd day of August , 2021.
DR. JULIUS MAADA BIO,
President.
LS
No. 6 2020
Sierra Leone
The Breast Milk Substitutes Act, 2021. Short title.
Being an Act to provide for safe and adequate nutrition for
infants and young children by promoting breast-feeding and
regulating the marketing of breast-milk substitutes and for other
related matters.
Date of com-
[ ]
mencement.
ENACTED by the President and Members of Parliament in this
present Parliament assembled.
